title: Custom Villager Trading
description: This mod has different custom villager trades!
body:
This is the **Custom Villager Trades** mod! There are currently 5 different trades. This mod is for people that want to have different custom trades or trades that should be in the game. Play to figure out what trades there are as they remain as a mystery until you find out! (for now) For this mod, all you have to do is download it, and drop it into your .minecraft mods folder, open up the game (Forge), and get playing!
# You can sumbit Bugs/Issues through this google form: [Click Here](https://forms.gle/w8HfRxVDFF5nd6378)

<details>
<summary>TRADES TEASER</summary>

One of the trades is a Totem of Undying. You can trade diamond blocks for a Totem of Undying from a Master Armorer. (4 diamond blocks for 1 Totem of Undying)

</details>
